creator: chip.cuccio@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 191088
Makefile patch for ver. 4.4.1, with ISC versioning handling.

ISC DHCP 4.4.1 was released today; attached a Makefile patch, removing FORBIDDEN flag since bug was fixed[1], and added handlers for ISC's myriad versioning conventions.

Cheers.

[1] <https://lists.isc.org/pipermail/dhcp-announce/2018-February/000418.html>
